/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/UMSGrpcServiceImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/RedisConnectPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/RedisManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/MySQLConnectPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/MySQLDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/MySQLManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/IOContextPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/AsyncTaskPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/message.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/UMSServer.dir/message.grpc.pb.cc.o -o UMSServer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -lgrpc++ -lgrpc -lgpr /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlcppconn.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
